focus_points.label: What she learned from last cycle’s decision
focus_points.reason: Whether she got a concrete readout on what the gap was, and whether she wants you to help interpret it now.

focus_points.label: How her engagement in team rituals is landing
focus_points.reason: Notes say her engagement in team rituals has dropped; one possibility is she’s still carrying unanswered questions, worth clarifying what changed and what she needs to feel steady again.

focus_points.label: Whether mentoring is her strategic growth path
focus_points.reason: What she wants to build next as a Principal often shows up in which growth work she chooses to invest in—whether mentoring is accelerating her next step or parking energy after feeling blocked.

focus_points.label: What she wants more of from you
focus_points.reason: At Principal level, the fastest career momentum usually comes from removing ambiguity—what she wants from you (readouts, advocacy, coaching, or sponsorship) so she can commit to the right next moves.
